title: BBS Light Form Addon
description: BBS Light Form lets your BBS Mod models emit vanilla Minecraft light (levels 0–15), even while morphing or playing in replays. Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1–1.20.4 and optimized for BBS Mod Iteration 0.8.7–0.8.8 Alpha.
body:
📦 Addon Name: BBS Light Form
🎮 Compatibility: Minecraft 1.20.1-1.20.4
✨ Description:
Bring light forms to your BBS Mod world! Now you can make your models not only look amazing, but also emit light. It addes vanilla Minecraft Light 
(Intensity = 0-15)

This addon allows you to:

**Add Light Forms:** Transform any model block into a light-emitting creation.

**You can morph it, or add it to replays:** Your forms can emit light while moving.

**Easy and Compatible:** Fully integrated with BBS Mod, ready to use immediately after installation.

It recommending with Iteration 0.8.7 and 0.8.8 Alpha but you can use it in no shader, or another shader.

*NOTE* : *This is a preview version, i will fix some bugs. If you find a bug ,message in this post.*
